subcodes.title: Words to Lua Getsinger, spoken on 1912-07-07
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Beauty entered into this Covenant for obedience and not for opposition. I say this merely for the protection of the Cause of God and for the purpose of safeguarding unity among the friends.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک این عهد را برای اطاعت گرفتند نه مخالفت و این را من محض حفظ امر الله و اتحاد احباء می گویم
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @firmness in the Covenant
